slides.headline: The Stress Testing Initiative
slides.subheadline: A regulatory-driven transformation with clear, measurable outcomes
bullets: Replace fragmented EWST/SAS 9.4 with a governed cloud-hosted platform
Meet CPS 900, ICAAP, CPS 190, IFRS9 and climate risk obligations
Reduce stress testing cycles from weeks to days
Uplift auditability, lineage and reproducibility across all outputs
Progressively decommission legacy systems through to FY29
slides.note: Technology delivery · Vendor execution · Legacy decommissioning · Regulatory timelines

slides.headline: Regulatory First — Not Optional
slides.subheadline: Success is measured in auditability, lineage and control — not just delivery
bullets: Mandatory uplift: CPS 900, ICAAP, CPS 190, IFRS9 and climate risk
Every output must be auditable, reproducible and lineage-traced
Moves stress testing from business-managed EUCs to a governed platform
Single accountable tech owner: cloud, data, security, environments, BAU
Regulatory language converted into executable controls and audit evidence

slides.headline: From Fragmented EUCs to Governed Platform

left.title: Current State
bullets: EWST and SAS 9.4 environment
26 EUC groups, 150+ manual processes
Business-managed, low auditability
Stress testing cycles measured in weeks
High regulatory and operational risk

right.title: Target State
bullets: Cloud-hosted governed platform (ElysianNAT)
26 EUC groups and 150+ processes retired
Tech-managed, full lineage and control
Stress testing cycles reduced to days
CPS 900 compliant, climate-ready

slides.headline: Vendor-Led Delivery with Tight Governance
slides.subheadline: ElysianNAT selected for lower delivery risk and better tech alignment
bullets: Governing specialist vendor to deliver contractual outcomes
Quality gates and delivery timelines enforced with rigour
Post-go-live T&M exposure actively managed and capped
Strong background protecting ANZ commercially through vendor execution
Delivery certainty without sacrificing platform quality or compliance

slides.headline: Delivery Aligned to Regulatory Cycles
slides.subheadline: Sequenced milestones from Mar-27 through FY29

phases.label: Phase 1
phases.detail: IWST go-live · Mortgages onboarded for ICAAP

phases.label: Climate
phases.detail: Climate stress readiness · ESG obligations met

phases.label: Decom
phases.detail: EWST retirement · SAS 9.4 exit · EUC group removal

slides.headline: Decommissioning is a Core Outcome
slides.subheadline: Not just a new platform — intentional, costed legacy removal
bullets: Retire EWST end-to-end — not coexist indefinitely
Exit SAS 9.4 with full data migration and lineage
Remove 26 EUC groups from the stress testing process
Retire 150+ manual processes with automated replacements
Delivers both material risk reduction and cost-out

slides.headline: 17 Years of Enterprise Transformation
slides.subheadline: A proven track record across ANZ's most complex programs
bullets: Led programs up to 250+ resources and $100m+ budgets
End-to-end accountability on regulated, data-intensive initiatives
Delivered across cloud, infrastructure, data and divestment
Trusted advisor to C-suite and executive governance forums
Built high-performing teams through complex, sustained change

slides.headline: Large-Scale Regulated Delivery
slides.subheadline: Delivering mission-critical programs under full regulatory scrutiny
bullets: Led ANZ Wealth Separation: $137m program, $975m+ benefits realised
$125m data centre and hybrid cloud transformation delivered
Navigated high regulatory complexity and mission-critical data environments
Strategic vendor management: IBM, Cisco and major partners
Full end-to-end accountability from design through BAU readiness

left.title: What the Role Demands
bullets: Own and drive end-to-end technology delivery
Translate regulatory needs into technology outcomes
Govern vendor-led cloud delivery commercially
Integrate with Program Director on plan and benefits
Drive decommissioning — not indefinite coexistence

right.title: What I Bring
bullets: Accountability for platform, integrations, controls and BAU
Regulatory language converted to controls, lineage, audit evidence
Governed specialist vendors with delivery certainty
Partnered on plan, dependencies, risks and funds
Milestones tied to regulator and cost outcomes

slides.headline: Program Management at Scale
slides.subheadline: Governance, planning and delivery certainty across 57 initiatives
bullets: Own enterprise technology roadmaps across 57 major initiatives
Manage complex dependencies, sequencing and trade-offs
Governance frameworks with clear milestones, risks and progress
$137m program governance with $975m+ benefits tracked
Executive-ready reporting that drives decision-making

slides.headline: Ready to Lead the Stress Testing Program
slides.subheadline: 17 years of regulated transformation — applied from day one to deliver platform, compliance and decommissioning outcomes ANZ can stand behind
bullets: Platform delivery accountable, not delegated
Regulatory timelines met: Mar-27 through FY29
ElysianNAT governed to contractual outcomes
Legacy fully retired — not coexisting indefinitely
